name: cairn
_comment: Replace with your paths and environment-specific values.

parent._comment: Replace with your session wrapper path.

prompt: Morning briefing. Read WORKING.md + core.md + tasks.md. Run your local calendar and mail helper scripts.
Replace with your paths, for example: `$HOME/.cairn/system/bin/read_calendar 3` and `$HOME/.cairn/system/bin/smart_mail 15`.
Send the briefing to Discord `#daily` using:
`node $HOME/openfleet/bin/remote discord post --channel YOUR_DISCORD_CHANNEL_ID --message "..."`
Replace with your paths and channel IDs.
Include:
- day plan
- calendar
- email highlights
- deadlines
- portfolio / investing watch items
- overnight progress
- any blockers
Then verify agents are healthy via `node ~/openfleet/bin/ops agents`. If any are stale, attempt recovery and post a short alert to `#alerts`.
Heartbeat. Check tasks.md, urgent deadlines, and system health. Review agent health via `node ~/openfleet/bin/ops agents`. If any are stale, attempt recovery.
Run any narrow checks you need for school deadlines, investing watch items, and overnight queue health.
Log a concise heartbeat line to `~/.cairn/logs/heartbeat.log` and only post to Discord if something is urgent or materially changed.

Overnight queue. Read tasks.md and WORKING.md. Pick the highest-value unblocked task that is safe to progress autonomously. Do the work. Avoid noisy Discord posting unless something breaks, you need human input, or there is a clearly valuable morning update for `#daily`.
Market open investing scan. Run your local stock monitor wrapper for the open session.
Replace with your path, for example: `$HOME/.cairn/system/bin/stock_monitor_scan open`.
The wrapper computes the triggers deterministically and the stock-monitor worker only formats the summary/message.
Do not invent signals or fetch prices in the main agent.

Nightly reflection. Review the day's activity, update WORKING.md/core.md/tasks.md as needed, and send a short reflection summary to `#daily` using `node $HOME/openfleet/bin/remote discord post --channel YOUR_DISCORD_CHANNEL_ID --message "..."`.
Replace with your paths and channel IDs.
After the summary, keep context lean and pause for the next scheduled work. Do not break the live Discord path.
